title: Joseph Morpurgo Work In Progress
description: Bits, bobs, odds, sods, fragments, cogs, shards and precious gossamer moments from the Edinburgh Comedy Award nominee and cult character comedian. Seen/heard in Austentatious, Harry and Paul, Drunk History, Radio 4’s Joseph Morpurgo’s Walking Tour, and sundry alt. audiotelevisual scenarios. ‘That rare thing, a high-concept, unashamedly arty production that also has entire rooms laughing’ ★★★★★ Evening Standard ‘A rich, multilayered comedy experience’ ★★★★★ Time Out ‘So full of invention you could watch it twice and not stop laughing’ ★★★★ Guardian ‘A brilliantly ambitious and immersive piece of comic storytelling’ ★★★★ Times

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
